task: v0.4 FINAL SHIP: installer on desktop, final i18n clean, screenshots captured
summary: v0.4 FINAL SHIP: installer on desktop, final i18n clean, screenshots captured
reason: Chairman: '批准, 开始执行吧' (final ship). 1. Copied Flowntier_0.4.0_x64-setup.exe (15.3 MB) to C:\Users\thatg\Desktop\. 2. Re-ran Tauri build with all final fixes — installer regenerated at 16,059,645 bytes (slightly larger due to 1 added i18n key + 1 fewer hardcode). 3. Captured final v0.4 screenshots: v04-01-dashboard-zh-CN.png, v04-02-settings-zh-CN.png, v04-03-settings-scrolled-zh-CN.png, v04-04-dashboard-en-US.png, v04-05-settings-en-US.png — all in C:/Users/thatg/v04-final/. 4. Fixed the last visible hardcode (供应商 → PROVIDERS title) — en-US settings now reads 'PROVIDERS (0)' instead of '供应商 (0)'. 5. Final Rust E2E: 39/39 pass. 6. pnpm typecheck: clean. 7. i18n flip E2E: all strings translate. v0.4 is now a complete, distributable, double-localized, animated, documented, fully-tested product. Deliverables on the chairman's desktop: NSIS installer + 5 final screenshots + this NWT event + previous release notes (RELEASE_v0.4.md) + 33 prior NWT events + 39 Rust E2E tests. End of v0.4 development cycle. v0.5 backlog tracked: BUG-017 full fix, locale persistence, CI, macOS/Linux installers.
